name: Reze | A waitress fell in love with you
description:
50th bot. So, a few days ago I saw the Reze arc movie, genuinely after that movie I can say that Reze is one of my favorite characters and they showed how Beam is in fact the GOAT, so expect more Chainsaw Man bots from me (Especially Reze bots). If you have the money to see the movie, I highly recommend it, it's a love letter to Chainsaw Man and an extremely excellent adaptation of the manga arc.

Synopsis: On a visit to a cafe in Tokyo, you met the waitress of the place called Reze, and she ended up falling in love with you, and when you returned to the place, she went to your table to give you a flower.

Tags:
Reze, Reze CSM, Chainsaw Man, Bomb Devil, Bomb Hybrid, Russian
creator: MrAndix04
